name: Capturly
description: Web analytics platform combining heatmaps, session recordings, conversion funnels, event analytics, surveys and JS error monitoring.

seo.title: Capturly — Session Replay / UX Analytics
seo.meta_description: Capturly: Web analytics platform combining heatmaps, session recordings, conversion funnels, event analytics, surveys and JS error monitoring.

when_to_use: Heatmap analysis to identify dead click zones
Session replay to debug JS errors in user context
Conversion funnel drop-off analysis per traffic source
NPS surveys triggered on key user journey steps

pros: Bundles heatmaps, replay, funnels and surveys in one subscription
JS error monitoring included without a separate APM tool
Affordable pricing tier for SMBs vs Hotjar/FullStory
Decent event analytics dashboards out of the box
cons: Jack-of-all-trades depth is shallow vs specialist tools
Recording quality lags Mouseflow and FullStory
Integration catalog is thin compared to incumbents
UI feels dated and slow on large datasets
review.verdict: Budget all-in-one for SMBs who want heatmaps plus analytics in one bill, with predictable quality trade-offs.
review.best_for: SMB marketing teams wanting replay, heatmaps and funnels without stitching three tools.
review.not_for: Teams needing enterprise-grade replay fidelity or deep product analytics.
